### fastapi/.agents/skills/fastapi/SKILL.md
```
h1 FastAPI
h2 Use the `fastapi` CLI
h3 Add an entrypoint in `pyproject.toml`
h3 Use `fastapi` with a path
h2 Use `Annotated`
h3 In Parameter Declarations
h1 DO NOT DO THIS
h3 For Dependencies
h2 Do not use Ellipsis for *path operations* or Pydantic models
h2 Return Type or Response Model
h3 When to use `response_model` instead
h2 Performance
h2 Including Routers
h1 In main.py
h2 Dependency Injection
h2 Async vs Sync *path operations*
h1 Use async def when calling async code
h1 Use plain def when calling blocking/sync code or when in doubt
h2 Streaming (JSON Lines, SSE, bytes)
h2 Tooling
h2 Other Libraries
h2 Do not use Pydantic RootModels
h2 Use one HTTP operation per function
code-fence bash
code-fence plain
```

```
class BaseModelWithConfig(BaseModel) {model_config?}
class Contact(BaseModelWithConfig) {name?, url?, email?}
class License(BaseModelWithConfig) {name*, identifier?, url?}
class Info(BaseModelWithConfig) {title*, summary?, description?, termsOfService?, contact?, license?}
class ServerVariable(BaseModelWithConfig) {enum?, default*, description?}
class Server(BaseModelWithConfig) {url*, description?, variables?}
class Reference(BaseModel) {ref?}
class Discriminator(BaseModel) {propertyName*, mapping?}
class XML(BaseModelWithConfig) {name?, namespace?, prefix?, attribute?, wrapped?}
class ExternalDocumentation(BaseModelWithConfig) {description?, url*}
class Schema(BaseModelWithConfig) {schema_?, vocabulary?, id?, anchor?, dynamicAnchor?, ref?}
class Example(TypedDict, total=False)
class ParameterInType(Enum)
class Encoding(BaseModelWithConfig) {contentType?, headers?, style?, explode?, allowReserved?}
class MediaType(BaseModelWithConfig) {schema_?, example?, examples?, encoding?}
class ParameterBase(BaseModelWithConfig) {description?, required?, deprecated?, style?, explode?, allowReserved?}
class Parameter(ParameterBase)
class Header(ParameterBase)
class RequestBody(BaseModelWithConfig) {description?, content*, required?}
class Link(BaseModelWithConfig) {operationRef?, operationId?, parameters?, requestBody?, description?, server?}
class Response(BaseModelWithConfig) {description*, headers?, content?, links?}
class Operation(BaseModelWithConfig) {tags?, summary?, description?, externalDocs?, operationId?, parameters?}
class PathItem(BaseModelWithConfig) {ref?, summary?, description?, get?, put?, post?}
class SecuritySchemeType(Enum)
class SecurityBase(BaseModelWithConfig) {type_?, description?}
```
